_holdings_schema.description: Each broker in countries.{country}.brokers[] can contain a holdings[] array

holding_fields.isin: ISIN if available (e.g., IE00BK5BQT80), null for B3 assets
holding_fields.cost_basis: Average cost per share in local currency
holding_fields.asset_class: One of: equity-etf, bond-etf, reit-etf, stock, fii, fixed-income
holding_fields.geography: One of: global, us, europe, emerging-markets, brazil, germany

_insurance_schema.description: Insurance policies held by the user. Each policy in policies[] represents one insurance contract.
_insurance_schema.type_values: Constrained to 11 known slugs: health, haftpflicht, hausrat, kfz, rechtsschutz, zahnzusatz, risikoleben, reise, fahrrad, kfz-schutzbrief, mietkaution
_insurance_schema.premium_fields: premium_monthly and premium_annual are separate fields — annual-pay discounts are common (e.g., 5% discount for annual payment)
_insurance_schema.coverage_amount: null for service-based types where coverage is unlimited or not sum-based (rechtsschutz, reise). For sum-based types (hausrat, haftpflicht, risikoleben) use EUR amount.
_insurance_schema.doc_path: Relative path from project root (e.g., .finyx/docs/hausrat-policy.pdf). null if no document stored.
_insurance_schema.coverage_components: string[] extracted by document reader agent from policy document. Each entry is a coverage line item (e.g., 'Personenschäden', 'Mietsachschäden').

policies.type: one of: health, haftpflicht, hausrat, kfz, rechtsschutz, zahnzusatz, risikoleben, reise, fahrrad, kfz-schutzbrief, mietkaution
